name: Migration
desc: Plan and execute a technology migration with approval gates and revision loops

state.contextConstraints: Backward compatible, no downtime, rollback plan required

nodes.title: Research & Planning
nodes.goalNote: Understand current system and create migration plan

children.details: Map all services, databases, APIs, and integrations that will be affected

children.target: best practices for migrating from ${fromTech} to ${toTech}
children.details: Look for official migration guides, known pitfalls, and recommended tooling
Include: step-by-step migration order, rollback procedures, risk assessment, and timeline estimates

nodes.prompt: Migration plan approved — proceed with implementation?
nodes.onReject: Revise the plan based on feedback

nodes.title: Implementation & Testing
nodes.goalNote: Execute the migration in stages with verification

body.details: Apply the migration step as described in the plan
Run all integration tests, smoke tests, and manual verification

else.details: Investigate and fix; if unfixable, rollback this step

nodes.details: Switch traffic, monitor metrics, and confirm stability
